cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. The problem gives their initial gifts: - Alice: green present - Bob: white present - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow present Then, they swap gifts in a series of steps. I need to track each swap and see what Eve ends up with at the end. The options are A to E, so I need to figure out the color or type of the present Eve has after all swaps. First, let me list all the swaps in order: 1. Bob and Alice swap 2. Alice and Eve swap 3. Claire and Eve swap 4. Alice and Dave swap 5. Bob
